mnemonics: CIA: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability. The three pillars of database security in the cloud.
keyPoints: Encryption at rest and in transit is fundamental for protecting data.
Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies are crucial for controlling who can access data.
Regular security audits and monitoring are essential for detecting and responding to threats.
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is solely responsible for all security (shared responsibility model).
Granting overly permissive access rights to users and services.
